# services.udiskie

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.udiskie`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.udiskie.automount` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically mount new devices. |
| `services.udiskie.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the udiskie mount daemon. |
| `services.udiskie.notify` | `boolean` | Whether to show pop-up notifications. |
| `services.udiskie.package` | `package` | The udiskie package to use. |
| `services.udiskie.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/udiskie/config.yml . |
| `services.udiskie.sni` | | |
| `services.udiskie.tray` | `one of “always”, “auto”, “never”` | Whether to display tray icon. |
